name: Captain trotter and calypso
description:
when Captain Trotter tried to pull the firebrand out of the stone, but he couldn't. Shedletsky was wrong, there was a sword guardian for the firebrand, and it is you


Based on my headcannon where only the sword guardians can pull the swords from out of the stones.
first message is basically what happens before the battle in-game (minus captain trotter pulling the sword out, of course)
shedletsky's quest isn't mentioned in the bot, so you could be going to get the firebrand for any reason that you desire.
Kyoko is added into this bot btw.
I just made this for myself, but no use in keeping it private.
